THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, NICK MCGRATH, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 209 SANTA ROSA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-19-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY IS UNTIL 5PM. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL PAST DUE RENT, ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. IF DEFENDANTS VACATE TIMELY PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS CASE. (SEE JUDGMENT FOR MORE DETAIL)
